body:
Bumps [filelock](https://github.com/tox-dev/py-filelock) from 3.12.0 to 3.12.2.
Release notes

Sourced from filelock's releases.

3.12.2

What's Changed

  • Restore 'if TYPE_CHECKING' syntax for FileLock definition by @​dlax in tox-dev/py-filelock#245

New Contributors

  • @​dlax made their first contribution in tox-dev/py-filelock#245

Full Changelog: https://github.com/tox-dev/py-filelock/compare/3.12.1...3.12.2

3.12.1

What's Changed

  • Add trusted-publish by @​gaborbernat in tox-dev/py-filelock#236
  • Add 3.12 support by @​gaborbernat in tox-dev/py-filelock#237
  • Bump pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish from 1.8.5 to 1.8.6 by @​dependabot in tox-dev/py-filelock#239
  • git ls-files -z -- .github/workflows/check.yml | xargs -0 sed -i 's|3.12.0-alpha.7|3.12.0-beta.1|g' by @​gaborbernat in tox-dev/py-filelock#243
  • Use ruff by @​gaborbernat in tox-dev/py-filelock#244
  • Fix test_bad_lock_file for other OSes by @​TheMatt2 in tox-dev/py-filelock#242

Full Changelog: https://github.com/tox-dev/py-filelock/compare/3.12.0...3.12.1

Changelog

Sourced from filelock's changelog.

Changelog

Commits
  • 3e628d4 Update release.yml
  • 26b4d7c Restore 'if TYPE_CHECKING' syntax for FileLock definition (#245)
  • 64034a2 Fix test_bad_lock_file for other OSes (#242)
  • 34ff501 Use ruff (#244)
  • b445623 git ls-files -z -- .github/workflows/check.yml | xargs -0 sed -i 's|3.12.0-al...
  • 0988ee9 Bump pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish from 1.8.5 to 1.8.6 (#239)
  • dbe3ba1 Update tox.ini
  • 8a13687 Add 3.12 support (#237)
  • 97e8ca0 Update check.yml
  • e27245e Add trusted-publish (#236)
  • See full diff in compare view

You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
